hero.titleLine1: The Right Model. The Right Price.
hero.subtitle: The only LLM router that picks the cheapest model that's actually good — for your query, in your language. Drop-in OpenAI replacement.

howItWorks.title: How It Works
howItWorks.subtitle: Three steps. Zero code changes beyond the URL.
howItWorks.step1Desc: Just use the OpenAI SDK. Point it at UniRo. Done.
howItWorks.step2Desc: We look at three things other routers ignore:
howItWorks.step2LanguageText: How many tokens does THIS model use for YOUR language?
howItWorks.step2Footer: This is what makes us different from every other router.
howItWorks.step3Desc: Same format as OpenAI. Your code doesn't change.
howItWorks.step4Title: See exactly where your money goes
howItWorks.step4Desc: Full request logs, per-model costs, latency tracking. Know which features are expensive before the bill arrives.

languageProblem.para1Start: LLMs use different tokenizers. The same sentence in Vietnamese uses
languageProblem.para2Start: But here's the thing nobody talks about: each model has a
languageProblem.para2End: . So Model A might be 3x cheaper than Model B for Vietnamese — but more expensive for English.
languageProblem.para3: No other router accounts for this. We do.
languageProblem.tableTitle: Same Vietnamese paragraph — each model charges differently

features.title: Everything you need to cut LLM costs
features.subtitle: Drop-in replacement. Instant savings. No lock-in.
features.languageAwareRoutingDesc: Picks the cheapest model that's good for YOUR language. Not just complexity — the full picture.
features.costSavingsDesc: Smart routing + compression. Real savings from real optimization, not marketing numbers.
features.dropInCompatibleDesc: OpenAI-compatible API. Works with Claude Code, VSCode, LangChain. Change 2 lines of code.
features.openWeightModelsDesc: Ollama, vLLM, any OpenAI-compat endpoint. Route simple queries locally for $0.
features.contextCompressionDesc: Long conversations get auto-compressed. Up to 80% token reduction. Zero config needed.
features.selfHostReadyDesc: Docker/K8s. Your infra, your keys, your data. Zero data leaves your network.

codeTabs.title: Quick Start
codeTabs.subtitle: Integrate in under 2 minutes. Use any OpenAI-compatible SDK.

pricing.title: Honest pricing. Your keys, your bills.
pricing.subtitle: Uniro never marks up tokens. You pay providers directly. Our plans cover the runtime, not the model.
pricing.freeDesc: Uniro is free for individual developers and open-source maintainers. One machine, every provider, unlimited sessions.
pricing.proDesc: Shared policies, pooled budgets, and cross-machine sessions for teams building with agents every day.
pricing.enterpriseDesc: Self-hosted runtime with a custom policy engine, VPC routing, and compliance controls for the largest orgs.
pricing.footer: All plans include language-aware routing, context compression, streaming, and fallback chains. You only pay for the tokens LLM providers charge — UniRo adds a small routing fee.

pricingPage.title: Pricing
pricingPage.subtitle: Pay for what you use. Save more than you spend.

billingFaq.a: Each call to /v1/chat/completions counts as one request, regardless of whether it's streaming or non-streaming.
You pay the underlying LLM provider's token cost plus a small UniRo routing fee (10% of token cost, capped at $0.01 per request).
Yes, upgrade or downgrade anytime. Pro plan is billed monthly, and changes take effect immediately.

billingFaq.q: Is the Enterprise plan self-hosted only?
billingFaq.a: Enterprise supports both cloud and self-hosted deployments. Self-hosted means zero token cost for open-weight models.

pricingPage.footer: All plans include language-aware routing, context compression, streaming, and fallback chains. You only pay for the tokens LLM providers charge — UniRo adds a small routing fee.

items.q: How is this different from OpenRouter?
items.a: OpenRouter is a model marketplace — you pick the model manually. UniRo picks the best model FOR you, considering your query complexity, cost, and how efficiently each model handles your language. It's automatic optimization, not manual selection.

Different LLMs tokenize non-English text differently. Vietnamese might cost 2x on GPT but only 1.2x on Gemini. UniRo knows these ratios and routes to the cheapest model that still delivers quality — per language, per query.

items.q: Will it work with my existing code?
items.a: If you use the OpenAI SDK (Python, TypeScript, or any HTTP client), yes. Change the base URL and API key. Everything else — streaming, function calling, tool use — works the same.

items.q: Can I use my own models?
items.a: Yes. Point UniRo at your Ollama, vLLM, or any OpenAI-compatible endpoint. The router treats local models as first-class citizens with $0 token cost.
SaaS mode: requests pass through our servers (we don't log prompt content). Self-hosted mode: everything runs on your infrastructure. Data never leaves your network.
Small routing fee on top of provider token costs. You save 50-80% on LLM costs; our fee is a fraction of your savings. We only win when you save.
The core routing engine, API, and provider dispatch are built and tested. Language-aware routing (the key differentiator) is actively being developed. Join the beta to get early access.

footer.tagline: The intelligent LLM router for every language.

chat.welcomeSubtitle: Intelligent LLM routing — your messages are automatically sent to the best model for the task.
chat.hint: UniRo intelligently routes your request to the best model
chat.errorBackend: Make sure the UniRo backend is running on port 8857.

problemCards.card1Title: Most prompts don't need your best model
problemCards.card1Desc: Code formatting, basic questions, simple edits. They don't need your most expensive model — but that's what you're paying for on every call.
problemCards.card2Title: You're blind to where money goes
problemCards.card2Desc: API bills show totals, not breakdowns. You have no idea which prompts cost $0.001 and which cost $0.50.
problemCards.card3Desc: Different models tokenize your language differently. The same sentence costs 3× on one model but only 1.2× on another. No other router accounts for this.

beforeAfter.title: One line changes everything
beforeAfter.subtitle: Literally one URL swap. That's it.
beforeAfter.resultTitle: Same results. Fraction of the cost.
beforeAfter.resultDesc: Simple prompts automatically route to cheaper models. Complex ones stay on premium. You save on every call.

classifierDemo.title: See the classifier decide
classifierDemo.subtitle: Real prompts. Real routing decisions. No black box.
classifierDemo.footer: Classification uses sentence embeddings (~10ms overhead). When uncertain, defaults to the complex model. Better to over-serve than under-serve.

productionFeatures.title: Built for production
productionFeatures.subtitle: Not a prototype. Ship it with confidence.
productionFeatures.dockerDesc: docker compose up gives you UniRo for a fully local stack. Mount your .env for API keys.
productionFeatures.fallbackDesc: When a provider returns 429 or 5xx, UniRo cascades through your fallback chain automatically.
productionFeatures.sessionDesc: Pins model choice for multi-turn conversations (30min TTL). No jarring mid-thread model switches.
productionFeatures.contextDesc: Estimates token count before routing. If prompt exceeds model context, swaps to a larger model.
productionFeatures.compressionDesc: Long conversations auto-compressed. Up to 80% token reduction with zero quality loss.
productionFeatures.privacyDesc: All credentials stay on your machine. No telemetry. No data leaves your network.

ctaSection.title: Stop overpaying for simple prompts
ctaSection.subtitle: Self-host for free, or use our managed API.
